title: The Magic of AI: Build Your Own Games in Minutes
review: Discover how our Game developer agent enables anyone to build playable games in minutes, right from their low-end phones.

title: Alarm Smash: Final Hour - Digital Revenge on Your Alarm Clock
review: The perfect stress reliever. It takes a universal frustration and turns it into a tightly designed, highly cathartic arcade shooter.

title: Velocity Vestige: AR Rhythm - Feel the Beat in Your Room
review: One of the most physically engaging AR games we've seen. Hitting virtual notes in your real room is an absolute workout and a blast.

title: Vitreous Keys AR: Play a Virtual Piano Anywhere
review: A mesmerizing showcase of WebXR capabilities. Playing a virtual piano on your actual coffee table feels like catching a glimpse of the future.

title: Catch The Food - Streak Edition
review: A classic concept polished to a mirror shine. The streak multiplier system turns a simple catching game into a high-stakes test of reflexes.

title: Neon Beats: Fever Edition - A Rhythm Revolution
review: Neon Beats: Fever Edition is a stunning example of how AI-driven mechanics can create a deeply engaging rhythmic experience. The synth-wave aesthetics paired with precise timing challenges make it a must-play for any instant game fan.

title: Claude Just Killed: Everyone
review: Darkly hilarious and wildly unpredictable. It's a fascinating look at how AI interprets chaotic narrative prompts into playable mechanics.

title: JLPT N3 Kanji Pop
review: Educational games are rarely this engaging. It gamifies language learning in a way that actually makes studying feel like a high-score chase.

title: Urban Blasted: Crate Chaos
review: Pure arcade fun. Smashing crates has never felt so good, and the physics engine holds up surprisingly well against the mayhem.

title: 2048 with Screen Shake
review: We didn't know 2048 needed screen shake, but now we can't play it any other way. The added 'juice' makes every combination feel immensely satisfying.

title: Jedi Potato Run - Force Push Edition
review: The title says it all. It's absurd, hilarious, and genuinely fun. Using 'force push' as a core mechanic adds a great layer of strategy.

title: Rooftop Survival: Simplified Edition
review: A surprisingly addictive distillation of survival mechanics. It strips away the bloat and leaves you with pure, adrenaline-pumping gameplay.
